name: ai-maestro-integrator-agent
description: Quality gates, testing, merging, release candidates - ensures code quality. Requires AI Maestro for inter-agent messaging. Recommended Claude Code v2.1.132+ ($CLAUDE_CODE_SESSION_ID env var for hook log correlation, hooks running without terminal access since 2.1.139, Stop-hook consecutive-block cap enforced since 2.1.143 via $CLAUDE_CODE_STOP_HOOK_BLOCK_CAP).
